zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybella Corbett於1275年出生在英國史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴時，她的父親Peter Corbet46歲，母親Alice de Orreby24歲。她於大約1283年與Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國享年25歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybella Corbett于1275年出生在英国史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴时，她的父亲Peter Corbet46岁，母亲Alice de Orreby24岁。她于大约1283年与Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在英国享年25岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Corbett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

variants.name: Corbit
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Corbett  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Corb
meanings: English (Durham): nickname from Middle English corb ‘raven’ (from Old French corb; compare Corbett , Corbin ).

variants.name: Corbet
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corban
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Corbáin ‘descendant of Corbán’ or Ó Coirbín ‘descendant of Coirbín’, both possibly from an occupational name based on corb ‘chariot’. Both names have also been Anglicized as Corbett .
Irish: alternatively, a variant of Currivan, from Ó Coirbheáin, itself a variant of Corban (pronounced with three syllables in Irish).
Romanian: nickname derived from corb ‘crow’, with the augmentative suffix -an.

nameMeanings.name: Sybella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name, apparently derived from   Isabella   by the dropping of the initial vowel.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybella Corbett was born in 1275, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, her father, Peter Corbet, was 46 and her mother, Alice de Orreby, was 24. She married Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae about 1283, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1300, in England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybella Corbett est née en 1275, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Corbet, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Alice de Orreby, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae environ 1283, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybella Corbett 1275 in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Corbet 46 und ihre Mutter Alice de Orreby 24. Sie hat um 1283 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 25 Jahren in England und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybella Corbett è nata il nel 1275 nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Peter Corbet, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Alice de Orreby, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae circa 1283, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1300, nel England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a Kington, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybella Corbettが1275年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで生まれた時，父Peter Corbetは46歳，母Alice de Orrebyは24歳であった。約1283年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでWalter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combaeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスで25歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybella Corbett(이)가 1275년 영국 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Corbet(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Orreby(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybella Corbett nasceu em 1275, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Corbet, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Orreby, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae aproximadamente 1283, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybella Corbett родилась в 1275 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter Corbet было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Orreby, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae около 1283 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybella Corbett nació en 1275, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Corbet, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Alice de Orreby, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae aproximadamente 1283, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1300, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
